citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:16 AM on
2/17/2026.
Inspector arrival to inspection site at 11:16 AM on Tuesday Feb 17 2026. The inspector was able to reach the licensee by
the primary contact phone number; licensee stated they were out of town and not available for conducting a facility
inspection..
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations.
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 11:16 AM on 
2/17/2026.  
Inspector arrival to inspection site at 11:16 AM on Tuesday Feb 17 2026. The inspector was able to reach the licensee by 
the primary contact phone number; licensee stated they were out of town and not available for conducting a facility 
inspection..  
Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. 
Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
